title: Make every consumer idempotent
description: Consumers dedup on event id so at-least-once redelivery produces a single effect.
body: Use when handling any event from an at-least-once broker. Do not assume each event is delivered once or process before recording the id. Actions: dedup on the event's stable id (processed-ids table or idempotent upsert) committed atomically with the effect; ack/commit offset only after the effect is durable. Validation signals include a test that replaying the same event id yields one effect and identical downstream state. Risk boundary: a non-idempotent consumer on a money or inventory event double-applies on every redelivery and must be escalated as a correctness defect.
